blocks.text: Arsenal and Bayern defend fragile leads — Europe's biggest night is here

Barcelona and PSG are already through to the semis. Now Ødegaard admits Arsenal have been 'a bit naive' — holding 1-0 against Sporting is no formality. Bayern's 2-1 over Real Madrid is equally treacherous.
⛳ Thu 06:00 — RBC Heritage: Hovland at Hilton Head after a T19 at the Masters

blocks.label: ☀️ Sunday's blockbusters
items: ⚽ 15:00 — Liverpool at Everton — Merseyside Derby, one of football's fiercest rivalries [★5]
⚽ 17:30 — Arsenal at Manchester City — six points clear, but the Etihad is the ultimate test [★5]
🏎️ 17:00 — Bahrain Grand Prix — Antonelli leads Russell by 9 points in a tight 2026 title fight
